# comfyui_latent_subtract (Resource)

ComfyUI LatentSubtract node [latent/advanced] Source: comfy_extras/nodes_latent.py:46 (v3_extras).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `samples1` (String) Input: LATENT. Link input.
- `samples2` (String) Input: LATENT. Link input.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance.
- `latent_output` (String) Output: LATENT (slot 0).
- `node_definition_json` (String) Serialized durable node definition used by comfyui_workflow fallback assembly.
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type.
